name: Alyssa Ashcroft || Resident Evil || (1)
description:
The bots will be of your scenario, the world is same as that of that of Resident Evil Requim, so take her age in present time or whatever you want, your Scenario and describe it properly.
[I personally will create this kinds of bots because I like it when you can just create your own scenario rather than a given one, so have fun]
